# Tactile

> A modern, context-aware keyboard shortcut engine for JavaScript and React. Layout-aware matching (event.key + event.code, never the deprecated keyCode), VS Code-style `when` expressions, first-class collision detection, sequences, runtime shortcut recording, and keymap introspection. Packages: @tactile-js/core (framework-agnostic) and @tactile-js/react (React hooks).

Complete docs in one file: https://tactile-js.vercel.app/llms-full.txt

## Getting started
- [Introduction (JavaScript keyboard shortcut library)](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/getting-started/introduction/)
- [Installation](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/getting-started/installation/)
- [Quick start](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/getting-started/quick-start/)

## Core concepts
- [Key syntax & bindings](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/concepts/key-syntax/)
- [event.key vs event.code: match modes](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/concepts/matching/)
- [International keyboards](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/concepts/international-keyboards/)
- [Context & when expressions](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/concepts/when-expressions/)
- [Collision detection](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/concepts/collisions/)
- [Limitations](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/concepts/limitations/)

## React
- [React keyboard shortcuts (overview)](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/react/overview/)

- [useScope](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/react/use-scope/)
- [useKeymap](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/react/use-keymap/)
- [useShortcutRecorder](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/react/use-shortcut-recorder/)

## Comparisons
- [JavaScript keyboard shortcut libraries compared](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/comparisons/)
- [vs Mousetrap](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/comparisons/vs-mousetrap/) · [vs hotkeys-js](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/comparisons/vs-hotkeys-js/) · [vs tinykeys](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/comparisons/vs-tinykeys/) · [vs keymaster](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/comparisons/vs-keymaster/) · [vs react-hotkeys-hook](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/comparisons/vs-react-hotkeys-hook/) · [vs react-hotkeys](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/comparisons/vs-react-hotkeys/) · [vs @github/hotkey](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/comparisons/vs-github-hotkey/) · [vs Combokeys](https://tactile-js.vercel.app/comparisons/vs-combokeys/)
